Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: All listed treatments/stresses and AMF colonization are discussed for NaCYP716A419.

Interacting_Proteins.reason: NaOSC2 was coexpressed in pathway assays, but no direct protein interaction is demonstrated.
